name: Grid Engine Submit Job
summary: Generate safe Grid Engine qsub scripts for common HPC job shapes.
description: This skill helps users create Sun Grid Engine, Oracle Grid Engine, Son of Grid Engine, or Univa Grid Engine qsub scripts for CPU, parallel environment, and array workloads with conservative defaults, clear placeholders, and notes about site-specific queue, project, resource, and PE syntax.

tools.name: mpirun
tools.notes: Parallel environment and MPI launcher names vary by site.

inputs.name: project
inputs.description: Site-specific project or accounting string used by local Grid Engine policy.

inputs.name: resources
inputs.description: Requested slots, memory, wall time, parallel environment, array range, and output paths.

outputs.name: grid_engine_script
outputs.description: A Grid Engine qsub script that can be adapted and submitted after site review.

outputs.name: job_id
outputs.description: The job id printed by qsub after submission.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced artifacts.
Check the CPU script shell syntax.
Run qsub with a short wall time on a test queue after replacing placeholders and confirming local queue, project, memory, and parallel environment policy.

references.title: Sun Grid Engine qsub man page
